evidence.description: LiveView test confirms admin sees create-market form with question, options, and voting window fields
LiveView test confirms form has submit control
HTTP smoke check: form present, question field present, options fields present, voting start/end fields present, submit button present
LiveView test confirms valid submission persists market with question, trimmed options in order, and voting timestamps
LiveView test confirms extra blank options are ignored as long as at least 2 valid options exist
Domain test confirms market created with valid attributes and trimmed options in order
LiveView test confirms blank question shows validation error 'can't be blank' and does not create market
LiveView test confirms whitespace-only question shows validation error and does not create market
Domain test confirms market with blank question is rejected
LiveView test confirms fewer than 2 options shows 'must have at least 2 options' error
LiveView test confirms duplicate options (case-insensitive) shows 'must not have duplicate labels' error
LiveView test confirms duplicate options (case-sensitive) shows 'must not have duplicate labels' error
Domain tests confirm rejection for single option and duplicate options
LiveView test confirms missing voting timestamps shows 'can't be blank' validation error
LiveView test confirms end time before start time shows 'must be after voting start' validation error
Domain test confirms market with voting end before voting start is rejected
LiveView test confirms guest access to /admin/markets/new is redirected to /sign-in
LiveView test confirms non-admin access to /admin/markets/new is redirected to /dashboard
Tests confirm no market or option rows are created for unauthorized attempts
LiveView test confirms invalid submission does not leave partial market or option rows
Domain test confirms atomic rejection - no partial market or options are created on invalid submission

frictions.description: CSRF token extraction from HTML requires specific pattern matching - the token appears before the name attribute
